name: PDM Workflow 1 — Prospect Research → Gamma Deck → Salesforce

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inputText: $json.deckContent, format: 'presentation', textMode: 'generate', themeId: $json.themeId, textOptions: { tone: 'professional', audience: 'dental practice owner', amount: 'medium' }, additionalInstructions: 'Professional B2B sales presentation. 10 slides. Data-driven, persuasive, clean. Strong headlines. Minimal text per slide. Emphasize competitive urgency and market opportunity.' }) }}

nodes.name: Gamma — Generate Deck
nodes.notes: Requires Gamma API key in HTTP Header Auth credentials (Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY). Get from gamma.app/settings/api.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', id: 1, method: 'tools/call', params: { name: 'sf_save_deck_url', arguments: { leadId: $json.leadId ?? undefined, accountId: $json.accountId ?? undefined, gammaUrl: $json.gammaUrl, deckTitle: $json.deckTitle, primaryGapType: $json.primaryGapType } } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', practice: $('Extract Gamma URL').first().json.practiceName, gapType: $('Extract Gamma URL').first().json.primaryGapType, gammaUrl: $('Extract Gamma URL').first().json.gammaUrl, deckTitle: $('Extract Gamma URL').first().json.deckTitle }) }}

meta.description: PDM Workflow 1 — Triggered by POST webhook when sf_research_prospect completes. Generates a Gamma prospect deck and writes the URL back to Salesforce via the PDM MCP server. Requires: (1) Gamma API key in HTTP Header Auth credentials, (2) PDM MCP Railway URL in sf_save_deck_url node.
